labels.name: audit-sample
labels.description: PR selected for ADR-0044 post-merge audit sampling.

labels.name: large-pr
labels.description: Non-human-authored PR exceeds ADR-0044 size guidance and needs review attention.

labels.name: out-of-band
labels.description: Out-of-band PR without packet scope context; review runs with reduced scope.

labels.name: skip-review
labels.description: Manual ADR-0044 escape hatch; Grid Review Runner skips PRs carrying this label.
